title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer
score_reasoning: Your backend systems and infrastructure experience transfer well to SRE responsibilities, and the role values Python/Go and CI/CD expertise you possess. However, it explicitly requires 4+ years of Kubernetes—a known critical gap for you. The location is listed as Ontario, Canada with remote option, creating timezone ambiguity. Canada spans 4+ time zones with 5-7 hour differences from Berlin, exceeding your strict ±2h preference significantly. The moderate location uncertainty plus substantial Kubernetes gap pull the fit down.

red_flags: 4+ years Kubernetes required (you lack container orchestration experience)
Ontario, Canada location with timezone mismatch (>5h from Berlin)
Remote claim unclear—no explicit EU/European timezone assurance
Kubernetes is primary requirement, not nice-to-have
